info.name: CrunchVeda CMS API
info.description: Postman Collection to test all live CRUD API endpoints for the CrunchVeda CMS pages.

request.description: Retrieves all modules. On first run, it seeds default configurations into MongoDB.
Retrieves the content sections specific to the homepage module.
Saves or updates a content section layout inside a module.
Removes a specific section configuration from a module by ID.
